description: Instructor bio with portrait, philosophy, and three guiding principles

fields.name: Headline
fields.default: Rooted in Practice, Led by Curiosity

fields.name: Description
fields.default:
I believe yoga isn't about perfect poses — it's about building an honest relationship with your body. My classes blend traditional Vinyasa with functional movement, creating space for both challenge and stillness.

After 12 years of teaching and thousands of hours of study, my approach remains simple: meet yourself where you are, breathe through what's hard, and leave feeling more like yourself.

default.title: Breath
default.description: Every movement begins and ends with the breath. It's the foundation of everything we practice together.

default.title: Strength
default.description: Not just physical — the quiet strength that comes from showing up for yourself, consistently and without judgment.

default.title: Presence
default.description: The rare gift of being fully here. On the mat, we practice the focus that carries into everything else.
